allow: Bash(cd /tmp/uipro-skill && echo "===ALL FILES under .claude/skills===" && find .claude/skills -type f | sort && echo "" && echo "===dir count===" && find .claude/skills -type d | wc -l && echo "===total size===" && du -sh .claude/skills)
PowerShell($c = Get-Command claude -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.Source } else { "not found via Get-Command" }; Write-Output "---npm global---"; npm config get prefix)

Bash(ls -la "$HOME/AppData/Roaming/npm/" 2>/dev/null | grep -i claude; echo "---local---"; ls -la "$HOME/.local/bin/" 2>/dev/null | grep -i claude; echo "---AppData/Local---"; ls "$HOME/AppData/Local/Programs/" 2>/dev/null | grep -i claude; echo "---.claude/local---"; ls "$HOME/.claude/" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(python scripts/search.py "mentorship platform students graduates career education swipe match social" --design-system -p "MentorMatch" -f markdown)
Bash(python scripts/search.py "dark theme social community app calm pleasant purple lavender" --domain color -n 3)
Bash(python -c "import xml.dom.minidom as m; m.parse\('design/mentormatch-mockup.svg'\); print\('SVG valid XML'\)")
Bash(python -c "import xml.dom.minidom as m; m.parse\('design/mentormatch-screens.svg'\); print\('SVG valid XML'\)")
